title: Technology: a speedbump, or a paradigm shift?
section_path: Technology: a speedbump, or a paradigm shift?
section_path_text: Technology: a speedbump, or a paradigm shift?
summary:
Main
In the past few weeks technology has underperformed the wider market. In the previous years, tech companies were debt-free, awash with cash, some of which they returned to shareholders. No they increased their debt, and the cash is directed to AI-related infrastructure.
